text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We pass by a crepe shop on our way home.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Crepes...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What would I want a crepe for?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They're fluffy, they melt in your mouth, and
they're kinda cute... Food for weaklings.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: They're too sweet for someone like me...

text_block_list.name: Crepe Shop Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Could I interest you in our Creamy Double Honey
Chocolate Banana Crepe? It's our most popular
item!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
A-anyway! Let's go get some meat! Meat! Go big
or go home!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
There's that kebab place in the park on the way
back! Let's go there!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...That's definitely better than crepes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She obviously wants a crepe... But I also feel like
it would be immature to call her out and shatter
her bravado...
choice_data_list: Do you mind if I get one?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: What?! You're gonna get a crepe?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: I mean...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Y-you're a grown-up. Aren't you embarrassed to
be eating at a place like this?
choice_data_list: I just really want one right now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Hmph. All right, fine.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I don't usually eat stuff like this, but I'll have one
too if you want one so bad.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, miss? Can we see a menu?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
My friend here reeeally wants a crepe, and won't
shut up about it... Heheh. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We both order different crepes according to our
tastes.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Mmmmm! It's so good! But way too sweet! Ugh! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka eats her crepe, looking extremely
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Uhhh... R-right!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. Kebabs are clearly the best food for an
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Trainer! The meat's waitin' for us!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So we go to the kebab stand in the park...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Two of your plainest kebabs, please!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Huh? You're gonna have ice cream too? That's a
lotta food.
choice_data_list: Eating a bunch is pretty cool too, isn't it?
Eating a bunch is pretty cool too, isn't it?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Oh! I see!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: According to that logic, I gotta have some too!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Excuse me! Make that two dondurmas!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Heheh. This is a feast fit for a king! Let's dig in! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Able to eat both meat and sweets, Vodka seems
very pleased.
